name: pixoo-mcp-server
description: Render and push styled pixel art, text, dashboards, and animations to Divoom Pixoo LED displays.

pixoo_ip.title: Pixoo Device IP
pixoo_ip.description: IP address of your Pixoo display on the local network (e.g. 192.168.1.50). Required for device tools. Run pixoo_discover_devices to find it.

pixoo_size.title: Pixoo Display Size
pixoo_size.description: Display size in pixels: 16, 32, or 64. Must match your physical device. Defaults to 64 (Pixoo-64).
